text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Humidity at forty percent. Indoor atmospheric
pressure stable. I believe these are considered to
be the perfect conditions for weight lifting.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! That's it, Bourbon, my fellow fitness buff! I
never skip a chance for a heart-to-heart with my
muscles—not even on a vacation!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Heart-to-heart? ...No. I have detected an
increase in body fat and thus have elected to
engage in some voluntary weight lifting.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I get it! If you wanna build muscle while
burning fat...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I know! You got a minute? There's somewhere I
want to take you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
The latest in fat-burning protein powder,
guaranteed to be ten percent more effective than
other leading brands!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: It just came out, so only bodybuilders who are really into seeing gains know about it!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for offering me such high quality
information!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Hey, don't mention it. I'm just glad we can talk
about lifting together.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, right! Did you want to try training someplace
different? I know just the right temple of iron for
you!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Status—"keenly interested." Preparations to
depart for so-called "temple of iron" complete.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Okay! Let's go get our pump on!

Making use of Ryan's valuable information,
Mihono Bourbon manages to return to her usual
athletic figure!
